typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: `PopoverQuickSwitchView.testTriggerSelectAndSwitch` still gated execution on stale in-memory profile lookup in commit `27463c0`, so UI-action switching proof remained unreliable for crossflow tests.

Fix commit `27463c0` did not update `SwitcherCrossFlowTests`, so prior rendered-indicator and UI-action evidence blockers from `integration-hardening-finalize-crossflow-rendered-ui-launch-trace-evidence` remained unresolved in that feature review.

appliedUpdates.description: Added integration-hardening crossflow seam reliability notes to `.factory/library/user-testing.md` covering store-backed fallback seams and reload sequencing after UI-action triggers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce `followedProcedure=true` only when handoff includes explicit manual UI sanity-check evidence and required validation/deviation reporting.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for `integration-hardening-fix-ui-action-seam-sync-for-crossflow-tests` and `integration-hardening-stabilize-ui-debug-seams-for-crossflow-tests` report `followedProcedure=true` despite no interactive checks and/or omitted required validation command coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten context-read evidence gating: require concrete command/tool evidence for required context files before allowing `followedProcedure=true` in handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for `integration-hardening-fix-crossflow-reload-active-profile-hydration`, `integration-hardening-crossflow-proof-v2-with-auditable-diff`, and `integration-hardening-rewrite-failing-crossflow-tests-to-valid-ui-action-patterns` found procedure compliance marked true without full required context-read/validation evidence.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add immediate new AGENTS-wide rule for repeated `testTriggerReload` after every UI-action seam call.
rejectedObservations.reason: too implementation-specific for mission-level policy; documented as factual library guidance instead.

rejectedObservations.observation: Treat every older failed fix feature as a current blocker even when superseded by later passes.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous triage policy; retained strict per-review blockers in synthesis but did not escalate additional meta-policy change.
